title: Pearson India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pearson India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
